title: zabelia mosanensis
intro: Zabelia mosanensis, also known as the Korean boxwood, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Zabelia mosanensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional East Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
